description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named docfx build that runs on every push to the master branch. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the master branch to a 'source' subdirectory, renames README.md to index.md, installs DocFX with choco, builds docs using docfx.json, then checks out the gh-pages branch to a 'docs' subdirectory. Finally, sync the generated site to the docs directory, commit and push any changes to gh-pages if necessary.
